retry_reason: Failure occurs when the MDIO node is not found in the device tree; that is a configuration issue and retrying will not change the outcome.
contract_summary: This function acquires a reference to the MDIO bus device node by calling of_get_compatible_child with a version-specific compatible string. It returns the node pointer with an incremented reference count. The caller must call of_node_put to release the reference when done. The function also caches the result in priv->mdio_dn, which should be released via of_node_put before being reassigned or on driver removal. On failure (node not found or memory allocation error), it returns NULL and logs an error.

judge.reason: The function's primary purpose is to acquire a reference to the MDIO device tree node via of_get_compatible_child (a refcount-get operation) and return it. The only non-refcount logic is error handling and storing the node in priv->mdio_dn, which are minimal side effects.
